title: HOMESHOPA 3 Pack Square Plastic Food Storage Containers 200ml, Leak-Proof, Stackable & Airtight Fridge Containers with Clip Lock Lid, BPA Free, Microwave Freezer & Dishwasher Safe
features: Fashion Meets Functionality: Style that suits your kitchen! Our small food storage containers combine functionality with a sleek design. The clear material not only lets you see what's inside but also adds a touch of modern elegance to your storage.

Portion Perfection: Perfectly Sized No more guessing! Our 3 Pack plastic food storage containers are designed for portion control, ensuring you have the right amount every time. Ideal for meal prepping or packing snacks for the day.

Built to Last: Durability you can count on! Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, these plastic leak proof containers with clip lock lids are built to withstand the test of time. Invest in kitchen essentials that stand up to daily use.

Seal in Freshness: Our airtight storage box features an airtight seal that locks in freshness, ensuring your food stays delicious and flavorful for longer. Say goodbye to food waste and hello to extended freshness!

Leak-Free Confidence: No more spills! Our stackable freezer containers are designed with a leak proof seal, ensuring your backpack, lunch bag, or fridge stays mess-free. Enjoy meals on the go without the worry of leaks.

Space-Saving Stackability: Maximize your kitchen space! Our food containers are stackable, allowing you to organize with ease. Effortlessly declutter your pantry or fridge and find what you need at a glance.

Versatile Magic: From freezer to feast, these BPA free plastic containers effortlessly transition between extreme temperatures, allowing you to store leftovers in the freezer, reheat in the microwave, and enjoy hassle-free cleaning in the dishwasher.

Dishwasher-Friendly Convenience: Spend less time scrubbing and more time enjoying your meals! Our microwavable storage boxes are dishwasher safe, making cleanup a breeze. Effortless maintenance for the busy lifestyle.
